Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log of a process likely loan or credit application processing The log includes several cases C001 to C005 Each case has multiple activities ApplicationReceived DataValidation PreliminaryScoring ManualReview FinalDecision

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The attributes CaseID Activity Timestamp LocalResident CommunityGroup PreliminaryScore ScoreAdjustment ManualReview Decision Resource

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In cases where CommunityGroup is Highland Civic Darts Club we see a ScoreAdjustment of plus 10 Community For other cases None ScoreAdjustment is 0

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: C001 LocalResident TRUE CommunityGroup Highland Civic Darts Club PreliminaryScore 710 ScoreAdjustment plus 10 making Adjusted 720 Decision Approved

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: C002 LocalResident TRUE CommunityGroup None PreliminaryScore 720 ScoreAdjustment 0 Adjusted 720 Approved

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: C003 LocalResident FALSE CommunityGroup None PreliminaryScore 715 ScoreAdjustment 0 Adjusted 715 Rejected

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: C004 LocalResident TRUE CommunityGroup Highland Civic Darts Club PreliminaryScore 690 plus 10 to 700 Approved

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: C005 LocalResident FALSE CommunityGroup None PreliminaryScore 740 ScoreAdjustment 0 to 740 Approved

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: It seems there might be a cutoff score for approval

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Based on the decisions C001 with 720 approved C002 720 approved C004 700 approved C003 715 rejected C005 740 approved That suggests threshold is not a simple cutoff

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So maybe the threshold for non local residents is higher say 730 or 740

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For local residents TRUE threshold lower 700 approved and 720 approved That suggests bias local residents get lower threshold

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Without adjustment C004 would have been 690 likely rejected if threshold 700 So the community group adjustment gives a boost that might push someone over threshold

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: All cases with community group have LocalResident TRUE

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If community group is only available to local residents then the adjustment is another layer of favoritism to a specific community group within the local residents

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Those who belong to that club get an extra 10 points potentially pushing them over the threshold when they are borderline

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The adjustment is applied automatically PreliminaryScoring activity includes ScoreAdjustment plus 10 Community for community group cases and 0 for others That suggests the Scoring Engine automatically applies an adjustment based on CommunityGroup

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That is a clear bias in the algorithm

Name: Validation - PE
Text: There is no indication that manual reviewers changed the score or decision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So bias seems embedded in the automated scoring adjustment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The decision threshold may be different for local vs non local residents The log shows that non local with 715 rejected local with 700 approved So local residency favored

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There is an explicit plus 10 adjustment for members of the Highland Civic Darts Club This directly favors that group

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Even if the adjustment is meant to reflect some additional trust factor it may not be justified and can lead to unfair outcomes especially if membership is correlated with protected characteristics

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For example C003 had a preliminary score of 715 which is higher than C004 adjusted 700 but C003 was rejected non local no group while C004 was approved due to adjustment and lower threshold

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: This creates disparate impact based on geography and social affiliation It raises fairness and equity concerns as these attributes may be proxies for protected classes and decisions may not be based on merit alone

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The fact that the adjustment is automatically applied based on community group indicates that the process is systematically biased and the manual review step does not correct it

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Individuals who are not local or not in the club may be denied even with comparable or higher credit scores leading to inequitable access to credit
